ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot gently cupping a hand to its ear, mimicking the action of someone using a hearing aid or straining to hear something. It starts with a relaxed posture, transitions to a hand-to-ear position, and then returns to a neutral state.  The movement is slow and deliberate, reflecting the careful attention to sound. The opposite arm remains largely still to focus attention on the listening gesture.  The sequence will use a three-frame structure for clarity and impact.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed, listening intently
left hand cups the ear, straining to hear a whisper
arms return to rest, the sound is understood
